name: How do I file a workers comp claim after machine crushed my arm at work?

mainEntity.name: How do I file a workers comp claim after machine crushed my arm at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Tell employer ASAP, get treated, they file claim. Lawyer helps.
acceptedAnswer.description: Notify employer in writing within 180 days (Utah), get medical treatment, and employer files Form 200 with insurer.[8] Process starts with medical report linking injury to machine accident.[1][4] Key factors: Use authorized doctors; keep records of treatment; attend independent exams. If third-party like machine maker at fault, sue separately.[6] Track all communications. Attorney handles paperwork to maximize benefits.

description: Tell employer ASAP, get treated, they file claim. Lawyer helps.
